name: Knight Card
description: As an action, you can throw this card to an unoccupied space on the ground within 60 feet of yourself while speaking a command word, whereupon the card magically transforms into a {@creature deck defender|BMT} (see {@book chapter 9|BMT|8|Deck Defender} for its stat block) for up to 1 minute or until you use an action to speak the command word again, whereupon it transforms back into a card. The deck defender obeys your spoken commands. If you issue no commands, it takes the {@action Dodge} actio
